  1. Home

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

Who We Are

The Royals Removals ("we", "us", "our") operates the website https://theroyalremovals.co.uk. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use our website and services.

Information We Collect

We may collect the following personal information when you fill in a form on our website or contact us directly:

  • Full name
  • Email address
  • Phone number
  • Moving addresses (from and to)
  • Property type and move date

How We Use Your Information

We use the information you provide to:

  • Provide you with a personalised removal quote
  • Contact you regarding your enquiry
  • Arrange and carry out your removal service
  • Improve our services and website

Data Protection

We take the security of your personal data seriously and implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect it. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

Your Rights

Under the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR), you have the right to access, correct, or delete the personal data we hold about you. To exercise these rights, please contact us at theroyalsremoval@gmail.com.

Cookies

Our website may use cookies to improve your browsing experience. Cookies are small text files stored on your device. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at theroyalsremoval@gmail.com or call 07345 624506.

Birmingham's most trusted premium home removals service. Stress-free, insured, and royal-grade care for every move.
